title: Beginning the Programming Journey
description: Started learning basic programming concepts, algorithms, and web development fundamentals (HTML, CSS, JavaScript). Discovering a passion for software.

title: Mobile App Development (Kotlin)
description: Developed and published '4G LTE Only App' using Kotlin. Learned Android SDK, networking, and publishing guidelines, reaching active users on Play Store.

title: Expanding to React Native & Expo
description: Built 'Pirith App', a mobile application using React Native and Expo. Focused on clean user interface design, state management, and audio playback integration.

title: Full-Stack Development & State Management
description: Developed 'HireMe Web' using React, Redux for state management, and Supabase for authentication and database services. Mastered modern styling with Tailwind CSS.

title: Aspiring Software Engineer
description: Continuing to build highly optimized, user-centric web and mobile software. Exploring TypeScript, Next.js, and system optimization techniques.
